titleStmt.title: SII 36.254: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 254. (A.R. No. 254 of 1910.) IḌAIYARPĀKKAM (Eḍayarpākkam), SRIPERUMBUDUR TALUK, CHINGELPUT DISTRICT. On the south base of the Śiva temple.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. Seems to be related to the previous inscription (No. 253). Grant of 30 kācus by Āṇḍamaichchāni, the daughter of Aruḷāḷa Bhaṭṭan for maintaining (3/4) of a lamp in the temple of Tiruppaḍakkāḍuḍaiyār at Iḍaiyāṟṟuppākam alias Rājavichchādhirachchaturvēdimaṅgalam in Purisai-nāḍu, a subdivision of Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. The shepherds declined to accept the money and subsequently the dēvadāṉa village of Purisai sold 2,000 kuḻis of land as iṟaiyili and probably agreed to maintain the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī korājakesaripanmarāna cakravarttikaḷ śrī kulottuṅgacoḷadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu jeyaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu maṇaviṟ koṭṭattup puricaināṭṭu Iṭaiyāṟṟup pākkamāna rājaviccātirac catuṟpeti maṅkalattu Āḷuṭaiyā
r tiruppaṭakkāṭuṭaiyāṟku Ivvūr savanan Aruḷāḷaṉ bhaṭṭan makaḷ Āṇṭamaic cāniyen Idevaṟkut tirunantāviḷakkukku nān Āṭukoḷḷavarakkāṭṭina kācu muppatukku mukkāl viḷakku celvitāka Āṭu koḷḷa kācu kuṭukka Iṭaiyar Ivvāṭu koṇṭu neyyaḷakka māṭṭomenṟu Iṭaiyarit tevar paṇṭārattu Ik
kācu muppatum Oṭukkinamaiyil Itdevar tevatānam puricai Ūrom Ikkācu tantu Eṅkaḷḷūrrille pūmi koḷa nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyeḻuttu Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāna Eḻuttip paṭṭiyil melaic ceṟuvum Itanmelai tirukuḷam Itan vaṭakkil
nālum Ākat taṭi palavināl patināṟcāṇ kolāl kuḻi Iraṇṭāyiramum Itil Uḷpaṭṭa kiṇaṟum Iṟaiyili tiru paṭṭamāka Iṟaiyiḻicci cilliṟai coṟumāṭṭu Āḷamañci nīrvilai yantarāyam
lam viṟṟukkuṭuttom puricai Ūrom Itanmam
Digital edition of SII 36.254 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
